title: GameStop Corp. Analyst Ratings, Estimates & Forecasts - Yahoo Finance
text: GameStop Corp is covered by multiple analysts with varying ratings and price targets. The consensus among analysts shows a bearish outlook despite some operational improvements. The average price target is 13.77 USD, which represents a significant downside from current levels. The buy percentage consensus is at 40, indicating analysts are rather negative about GME. More specifically, GameStop has been analyzed by analysts with a consensus rating of Sell. 0% of analysts recommend a Strong Buy, 0% recommend Buy, 0% suggest Holding, 100% advise Selling, and 0% predict a Strong Sell. GME is expected to report earnings on 6/8/2026. The consensus EPS estimate for the next earnings is 0.12 USD and the consensus revenue estimate is 774.31M USD. GameStop reported Q4 fiscal 2025 net sales of $1.104 billion, down 14% from $1.283 billion in the prior year and missing consensus estimates of $1.47 billion. Diluted EPS came in at $0.22, with adjusted figures showing a strong beat over analyst expectations around $0.37, supported by gross margin expansion to 35.0%. Overall, analysts maintain a bearish outlook on GME despite some operational improvements in the latest earnings report.
